---
title: "Introductory Functional Analysis"
author: "Kreyszig"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

\newcommand{\para}[1]{\left( #1 \right)}
\newcommand{\W}{\mathcal{W}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\C}{\mathbb{C}}
\newcommand{\Z}{\mathbb{Z}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\Cov}{\mathrm{Cov}}
\newcommand{\Var}{\mathrm{Var}}

# 7.1 Spectral theory in finite dimensional normed spaces

### 2. Show that the eigenvalues of a Hermitian matrix $A=(\alpha_{jk})$ are real.

### 3. Show that the eigenvalues of a skew-Hermitian matrix $A=(\alpha_{jk})$ are pure imaginary or zero.

### 2. Show that the eigenvalues of a unitary matrix $A=(\alpha_{jk})$ have absolute value 1.
